name: EventMessages
description: Automatically sends public messages on server events like join, leave, ban, unban and timeouts. Configured via slash commands (em-).
end_user_data_statement: This cog only stores guild-specific settings (enabled state and channel IDs). No personal data is stored permanently.
install_msg: EventMessages loaded. Configure it with the em- slash commands or via the web dashboard.
author: pd-codes
